programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Linda tries to walk Jake, he goes mad to protect her; Chantel wants to walk her 150-pound rottweiler King.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Scrawny is the favorite dog in his household, but popularity has gone to his head; Lola the dalmatian is spoiled.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A 12-year-old beagle mix displays unpredictable aggression; a couple tries to fit an aggressive puppy into their family.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Caper, a miniature Doberman rescue dog whose never been trained and Julius, a pit bull who is scared of everything.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple fear their border terrier is untrainable; an excitable English bulldog causes trouble for its owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An owner worries that her Doberman suffers from separation anxiety; a yellow lab has a problem with biting.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheelchair-bound owner wants to keep her German shepherd Shep in line; Sasha, the Lhasa apso, must learn who's boss.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dogs with Jobs
programme.desc: Willy: Seizure dog (St. Helen, Michigan) - Joanne Weber suffers from epilepsy. Her life is transformed when Willy, a golden lab, enters her life.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian and Peter have to cope with two night-time emergency call-outs. New vet Esme performs her first emergency caesarean and a pack of bloodhound pups causes mayhem in the surgery.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Celebrate puppies with a Puppython! The cutest puppies, nonstop.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Inspector Anthony Joynes arranges a warrant to rescue four dogs from a dangerously overcrowded house.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian must treat a pregnant heifer with a pelvis that may be too small to give birth, while a cat that lost a leg after being run over by a car suffers another injury in a road accident, but this time, no treatment may be possible.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: In this episode, Peter gets a call to help a Mother ewe deliver her baby lambs, but there are complications when Peter finds out the two are tangled in the womb.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Lazy Dayz
programme.desc: You know what's lazier than dog dayz? Cat dayz.

programme.title: Animals Unleashed
programme.desc: A monkey hill, raccoons get Easter treats, and a lucky sea lion hitches a ride. And in our Top 5, a cat uses the potty.

programme.title: Pet Heroes
programme.desc: One Dog’s actions during the Battle of Hong Kong earn him a unique place in Canada’s military history. And an encounter with a starving puppy in Afghanistan spurs a group of Soldiers into action.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Matt delivers a calf, Peter removes a lump from a dog's eye, and Julian repairs a slipped patella on a cat and nips a sheep with a birth defect. Peter and Shona go 4-wheeling.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter faces an emergency midnight lambing, Julian has to operate to remove his dog's tooth, Poppy the cat requires complex surgery on her badly broken leg. Peter, Julian and the Huddersfield vets meet up for a ramble on the moors.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian heads to the historic Harewood House near Leeds to check on some goats who are moving to a new enclosure. But catching them isn't going to be easy. In fact, it proves quite painful!

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Cat thinks stuff toy is her baby; Dog tangles himself in cord; Dog humps balloon.

programme.title: Animals Unleashed
programme.desc: A wood whittling goat, enough sheep to put you to sleep, plus a horse opens the door to a tiny house. And in our Top 5, a cat turns a foosball game into a fur ball nap.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian is called out to treat two cattle from farmer Stuart Robinson’s herd. Julian removes a stone from the first cow’s hoof. But the second animal is a different proposition. Despite being sedated, one-ton bull Merchant drags Julian around the barn.

programme.title: Animal Attractions
programme.desc: Pet Trainer 911 finds a new home for an unwanted dog and discovers that divorce can be hard on pets too. Is your lifestyle energetic enough for a Jack Russell Terrier?

programme.title: World's Ugliest Pets
programme.desc: Picture perfect pugs, cutesy kittens and beautiful baby rabbits - the world is awash with adorable pets. But what about the ugly ones? We celebrate the pets who haven't been blessed with beauty in a brand new, one-off programme

programme.title: Going To the Dogs
programme.desc: January marks the start of a new season on the dog show circuit.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Indonesia but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it, and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Back in Denver, Blake continues his frantic search for Steven with the help of psychic Jason Dehner. Blake refuses to believe his son is dead, and Krystle is worried about his erratic behavior. Fallon mends fences with stepmother, Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An obviously ill Jeff continues to function in a confused state. Sammy Jo announces she's headed for New York to make it big as a model and no longer wants to keep her son, Danny. Blake offers the girl $100,000 to be a mother to the child.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff's temper continues to grow more volatile. Adam attempts to implicate Jeff in the Cecil Colby/Logan Rhinewood scandal. After learning that Blake and Krystle intend to adopt Steven's son Danny, Alexis demands custody of her grandson.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Although Blake begs her to postpone taking action until Jeff's violent behavior can be explained. Fallon flies to Haiti to obtain a divorce; Mark shows up unexpectedly at her hotel. Alexis tells Adam she cannot allow Jeff to be poisoned.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is concerned the doctors will learn the truth behind Jeff's illness, but Adam tries to cover by ordering his office remodeled and the lethal paint compound removed. Mark and Fallon get closer in Haiti.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Alexis knows the reason for Jeff's illness; Blake tries to prevent Alexis' proposed merger; Jeff is released from the hospital and Kirby reveals her feelings for him.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Blake is departing for Singapore to identify his son, Alexis intercepts him at the airport to assure him she will not be stopped from merging their respective companies.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake persaudes Steven to return to Denver for his son's sake; the rest of the Carringtons are emotional, learning that Steven's alive and returning home; once home, Steven reunites with Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon hearing that Kirby has married Jeff, Joseph tells his daughter she has ruined her life. Blake suggests to Alexis they call a truce to their battle over Steven; Alexis offers Steven a share in Colbyco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the Board of Directors gathers to vote on the Denver-Carrington/Colbyco merger, Alexis pointedly tells the group that a nay vote will be met with immediate dismissal. The approval of the motion sends Blake into a fury.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake confronts Alexis with evidence of fraudulent figures involved in the recent merger; Alexis learns Blake's lucrative oil extraction process does not extend to Colbyco. Newlyweds Jeff and Kirby have their first fight.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A scandalous newspaper headline implicates Congressman McVane with a young girl in Washington; he realizes Alexis orchestrated his downfall. Kirby finds she is pregnant.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: When Blake learns Steven's attorney Chris has moved in with his son, he vows to fight for custody of little Danny. Morgan Hess, Alexis' private investigator, asks his employer for a large sum of money to pay off a gambling debt.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: The richness of Portugal's coastal waters is amazing. Thousands of creatures live here, both in the water and on land. The Portuguese coast is the ultimate frontier before the Atlantic Ocean.

programme.title: Rising Tide
programme.desc: In the series premiere, Rising Tide takes viewers to Greenland, where melting glaciers are contributing to rising sea levels that threaten coastal regions worldwide. The episode also travels to the Netherlands.

programme.title: End Of The Big Cats
programme.desc: Prosecuted for many decades, Africa's lion population has declined to only twenty thousand, and many biologists and conservationists are starting an international campaign to save these extraordinary animals.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Water is a vital element for the survival of all living beings on Planet Earth. From the top of the mountains where the rivers begin to run, to their final destination, we will get to know the animals and landscapes that cross the heart of Wild Portugal.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: The safari continues at Bumi Hills Safari Lodge where Kristina joins the anti-poaching unit on their everyday, thrilling duties. The fishing challenges with Madison continue and the breath-taking lakeshore game viewing experiences keep coming.

programme.title: Wildest latin america
programme.desc: In the centre of South America, a vast, wild expanse: the world's largest wetland. But this is no ordinary swamp. Every year it's drowned by immense floods, and then parched by severe drought.

programme.title: Life Stories: Behaviour For Life: Life Stories Special
programme.desc: The biggest show on Earth is wildlife in action. Fight, communicate, build, love, breed, and eat: these are the basic animal behaviours. This series treat them all, one by one.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI DESTINATIONS
programme.desc: Camp Amalinda

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Japan's 7,000 islands stretch for over 2,400km, and cover an incredible range of climates. Winter in the central and northern islands can be savage, but summer in the sweltering southern islands couldn't be more different.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, it's moving day for Girls Ailsa and Zingula, they are off to their new home at Paardevlei while cub handler Emily is also saying goodbye and heading home to Scotland.

programme.title: Wild Colombia With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: The wildlife expert searches for anacondas, the biggest snakes in Colombia, in the flooded forests of the Amazon.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Dr. Greg sets up a darting competition – the winner gets to dart a zebra on an upcoming case. Delarey, the hunter, is shocked when Roxanne, hits a bulls eye! Can he do the same?

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: Episode 9

programme.title: The Upside Down Tree
programme.desc: The African Baobab is one of the largest living things in the world, an icon of the African landscape, instantly recognisable, mysterious and intriguing. It is the world's biggest flowering plant and the largest succulent plant on earth.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The cloud rainforest is a unique ecosystem that grows in equatorial regions, perched on peaks of over two thousand meters, where clouds permanently deposit water and the weather is cold.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Episode 6

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: The team suddenly realizes that the twin daughters of a murdered couple are missing.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: A man who volunteered in South America fails to return home.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: The team searches for a young woman who disappeared while on spring break.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: A groom disappears a few weeks before his wedding.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Two ransom notes are delivered when a wealthy businessman is kidnapped.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tensions flare at Dondre and Janelle's over-the-top party; Johnny forces Tal to face the truth about who he is.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Poppy and Janelle open up to one another; Rigo and Dondre grapple with the events of the party.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Rigo goes viral; King makes a big reveal to Poppy.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Sage Odom's tour auditions get underway; Uncle Al tries to save the twins; Collette and East-O's turbulent past comes to a head.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Realizing what it takes to become professional dance squad; Rigo has questions after Eart-o's death.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: The rivalry between Tal and Zo comes to a head; Davis meets Odalie's parents.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Basie's sermon regarding inclusivity in the church goes viral, lighting a fire under Grace and provoking Bishop's suspicions; Kerissa pushes Jacob to get a day job.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: A series of recurring nightmares leaves Grace unnerved; Charity looks to take her relationship with Jabari to the next level; Bishop gives Basie an ultimatum.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Lionel returns and drops a bombshell on Bishop and Lady Mae; Charity receives great news from Jabari; Jacob encounters resistance on his first day as head of Triumph.

programme.title: Fuerte, audaz y valiente

programme.title: Encrucijada
programme.desc: Historias reales sobre la bifurcación del camino de diferentes personas, que llevan a cambios en el futuro y hacen frente a una encrucijada.

programme.title: Retofamosos
programme.desc: Seis famosos son reunidos en una azotea para enfrentar los retos más atrevidos, graciosos, chuscos y hasta arriesgados en donde el glamour y la fama se quedan atrás para dar paso a la diversión y el buen humor.

programme.title: A que no puedes
programme.desc: Emocionante juego que enfrenta a dos equipos de celebridades en su intento por realizar pruebas y retos únicos. El equipo que complete con éxito la tarea, ganará dinero para una obra de ayuda social.

programme.title: 100 latinos dijeron
programme.desc: Dos familias competirán respondiendo a distintas preguntas por la oportunidad de ganar dinero basados en las respuestas más populares, de acuerdo a las previamente respondidas por 100 latinos alrededor de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Mi sueño es bailar
programme.desc: Celebridades ayudan a los participantes a hacer sus sueños realidad. Durante cada episodio la pareja con más puntos obtiene la oportunidad de escoger cual sueño se hará realidad.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!: Noche de Pollo al Horno
programme.desc: Spencer Watts prepara un nutritivo plato para cuatro y presenta un crujiente pollo al limón, rösti de batata y duraznos al horno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most brazen crimes of the 20th century. Adolph Coors III, chairman of the Coors Brewing Company, was kidnapped and held for ransom. The crime prompted one of the most intense manhunts in United States history.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It's usually easy to determine how a criminal entered the crime scene. But in this case, it looked as if the killer vanished into thin air — and perhaps he had.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case using only a squashed tomato found at the crime scene and tiny, pinpoint reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Seattle police had no suspects in the violent murder of grunge singer Mia Zapata. More than a decade passed before evidence collected by a prescient medical examiner could be used by forensic scientists to identify the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the "dirt" on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This killer probably hoped to cover his tracks by staging the crime scene. But investigators saw through the attempt almost immediately and turned to forensic science to learn what really happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of college student Laura Salmon was found on a Middle Tennessee farm, covered with her own denim jeans as well as the jeans of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.desc: As Tommy rushes to rescue Elsa from Zeltrax, the Rangers stage one last final battle against Mesogog.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los nueve Chefs restantes realizan una prueba de sabor a ciegas. Los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay en un comedor completamente oscuro donde no pueden ver lo que están comiendo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes hacen crepes. Los ganadores cenarán en un restaurante francés mientras los perdedores se preparan para un servicio de cena con temática francesa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los medallistas olímpicos de invierno Sasha Cohen y Jonny Moseley aparecen como jueces invitados. Para este desafío, todos los ingredientes deben provenir de Whistler, B.C.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Los chefs se preparan para su tercer servicio de cena, pero la presión de Hell's Kitchen es demasiado para un concursante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: Los concursantes intentan recrear los platos característicos de Gordon para un público exigente de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: Las tensiones surgen en la cocina durante la noche italiana. En el restaurante hay un equipo que quiere ganar jugando sucio.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tropicana club is about to re-open under new management and is looking to Ricky to put on the best possible show. The only problem is that Ricky has come down with a terrible case of laryngitis, and is unable to talk, much less sing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel flashes back to the time when she and Lucy raced to win the presidency of their club, the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League. When Ethel was nominated for the position, Lucy bribed another member to nominate her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred and Ethel overhear a fight between Ricky and Lucy...or did they? It seems Lucy is reading a murder mystery out loud to the amusement of Ricky. But when Ricky playfully throws the book at Lucy, she ends up with a black eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are out a restaurant and Lucy keeps changing her order and their seating. Ricky points out that she constantly changes her mind and never completes things.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' infant is cranky and keeps his parents as well as their neighbors up at night. When a neighbor, Mrs. Trumbull points out that the lease forbids children and threatens to move out along with other tenants.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are exhausted from walking the baby at night and hire a maid. Lucy prepares a list of dos and don'ts in order to set down the law for her new employee. However when Mrs. Porter arrives, she has her own list for her employer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to get into the act when Ricky is producing an Indian show at the Tropicana. Ricky instead hires the Mertzes to be part of the show, hoping Lucy will be cured of her show biz bug now that she is a mother.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky has planned a surprise party for Lucy's birthday and swears the Mertzes and all their friends to secrecy. Lucy, however, only knows that everyone has forgotten her birthday.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: An eligible bachelor is in town, and Lucy wants to set him up with a girlfriend of hers. The bachelor is a lingerie salesman by the name of Eddie Grant who is a friend of the Mertzes. Unfortunately, Lucy's attempts at matchmaking fail.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Without consulting Ricky, Lucy buys new living room furniture, using their old set as a down payment. Waiting for the right moment to tell Ricky the news, she hides the new furniture in the kitchen.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels that she and Ricky are growing apart because they don't share many of the same interests. To make up for this, Lucy decides to invite herself along to a camping trip that Ricky and Fred are going on.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Life magazine does a photo layout on the Ricardos and the only part of Lucy visible in the shot is her elbow. Lucy insists on getting a part in Ricky's act so that she can make a name for herself.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Dismayed that they can't seem to unglue their husbands from the boxing match on TV, Lucy and Ethel decided to go out for a bite to eat. However, at the local café they run into a similar problem.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos have just purchased a new washing machine and despite their better judgment, agree to sell their old one to the Mertzes. The next day the old machine explodes with water and suds and the Mertzes insist that the deal is off.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that the Ricardos need a bigger apartment. She discovers that an older couple in the building just had their daughter move out and they no longer need the extra space. All she needs to do is to convince Ricky to go along with the trade.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After watching two women walk out of a local dress shop with $200 in purchases, Lucy and Ethel decide to buy the shop and go into business for themselves. The first signs of trouble begin when they can't agree on a name for their store.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: The student council is accepting ideas for this year's big initiative! Aliya races to think of a proposal as Brad's bad idea grows in popularity.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Struggling to choose only one of her friends' many ideas for what should go inside the new community center, Aliya must find a different solution.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Trying to make the final preparations for the big opening of the community center, the friends' plans are disrupted by the Seniors' weekly Bocce game.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Hours from the launch of the community center, Autumn must free Aliya from the nurse's office while Olly and Paisley hold last minute auditions.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Fendrich and Sinclair compete to win the City's tallest building contest. An off-screen narrator narrates a day in the life of a helpful handyman, Harl Hubbs.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's "Hands Off Day!" a city holiday, where the entire city doesn't use their hands for anything. A nature documentary crew follows Billionaire Fendrich as if he was an animal in the wild.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Teenage superstar, Poppy Starr, visits her grandfather, Sargent Sam Grizzled. Billy and Madison lose a flying disc inside a creepy-looking house.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: The Mayor and Carol work late when all manner of strange events begin to happen. Extreme Sports host, Dynamo, holds a competition to see who will go on the City Mars mission.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Firefighter Buster Lloyd gets the opportunity to live out his fantasy of being a police officer. Sanitation worker, Shirley Keeper, educates local residents on how to take care of their City.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's the day of the big rocket launch, and the entire city has Mars/launch fever! Astronauts reach Mars orbit and prepare to launch their probes, but Tippy Doorman has other plans.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor declares himself to be the destined leader who will reawaken The Great Devourer – an ancient beast who can’t be killed and will consume all of Ninjago. We find out Nya is the Samurai and Lloyd is taken prisoner by the snake tribes.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the four ninja follow the mysterious falcon into the woods, they stumble on a hidden work shop where Zane learns the secret about his past and in the process, finally knowing who he is, he is the first ninja to unlock his true potential.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have to cut their first date in Mega-Monster Amusement Park short as the Serpentine are on their way to retrieve the first or four fang blades to be used to awaken the Great Devourer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him; he tells Jestro he’s not ready for that kind of power.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It’s pretty scary. But he feeds it to the Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, and the monster that can induce fear.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: It’s movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about the remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.”

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl’s hometown of DIGGINTON (where they realize that all of Axl’s family look just like him.) While they’re there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books!

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they’re booed and pelted with food.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.”

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro, while still attacking the King’s Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he’s found (and has been saving.) It’s the powerful “Book of Revenge!”

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: No thief has ever succeeded in stealing the secret gem of Pompeii's nunnery; it's guarded by venomous snakes. Even Arsene Lupin gave up on it, since he hates snakes. But Lupin takes on the challenge. Will Lupin succeed? And what kind of secret gem is it?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though the tycoon Steel had replaced all his bodily organs with artificial organs to live, he's told that he only has a week to live. There is only one way he could prolong his life, which is to receive a brain transplant and he wants Lupin's Brain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Famous gourmand and field mice scientist Salmon Whitney is also known as being the chairman of a Canadian diamond mining operation. Lupin is after his diamonds, which will go on auction in Paris.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Coaxed by Fujiko, Lupin decides to steal the diamond chandelier at the Kremlin Palace. He disguises himself as Zenigata and infiltrates the palace, but government police soldier Natasha captures him and throws him in the slammer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: England's Lord Weather provokes Lupin with a bet, and dares him to steal Red Arrow away from him. Lupin takes the challenge as it's a matter of pride, but Jigen wants no part of it because he and Weather are gambling buddies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Miami Bank is on the verge of bankruptcy after its last customers closed their accounts. The bank manager Garlic devises a plan to revive the bank, and drums up news that his bank had been raided by Lupin; he also asks Lupin to really do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Thief brothers Nanja-Monja have been in the business since the days of Arsène Lupin; they decide to induct Lupin as a tourist attraction for the Republic of Karchina. But first they abduct Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko joins Lupin and gang who are camping and cooking Sukiyaki; people are hunting Fujiko, and gunfire is exchanged. Fujiko gets captured and Lupin's Sukiyaki meal gets ruined, but he finds an atomic bomb's detonator plug inside of the Sukiyaki bowl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Genius prodigy boy Romanoff has ten doctorates from Russia's Public Academy; blustering that no greater than he exists, he challenges Lupin. Since Fujiko is involved, Lupin cannot back down; what will become of this challenge?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko is the model for Norway's famous sculptor Vingel's crystal mermaid statue; she believed when he said he would give it to her the day it was finished, but Vingel gets greedy and sells it to the mayor of the city of Bergen instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin tries to steal a bunch of diamonds from a diamond auction. But the auction auditorium is at the Marine Tower above a skyscraper, and there is only one transparent elevator to get there.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin heads to Mecca to steal Mohammed's treasure. But first he is confronted by Patra Lawrence, the grandaughter of the Lawrence of Arabia, who is the chief of Mecca's special police headquarters; how will Lupin steal the treasure now?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Fujiko instigates Lupin and friends to go steal; this time their target is the Jovich Piano installed in a music hall built around it. There is no door large enough in the hall to carry the piano out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the shipment of raw diamonds that arrived at a harbor in Nice; he sneaks into the storage in the middle of the night but Zenigata was on to him. Lupin escapes with the help of Jigen and Goemon, but Fujiko gets captured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A month ago, president Gappolini of one of the world's top five trading companies, had died. Gappolini bequeathed a will saying that the heir to the company presidency will be the world's finest sharpshooter and Jigen is a target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's said that immense sums of money confiscated from organized crime get transported to a Swiss bank by ICPO, once a year. Naturally, Lupin wants a piece of that action, so he steals the armed security vehicle along with Zenigata in it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The city of Grand Hexagon lies at the border of France and Spain; the city is designed with six sides. But at the center of the city is Raika Bank storing fifty tons of gold bullion; an alarm will go off if even one bullion is missing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Robot soldier Lamda flies above the sky of Tokyo, raids a jewelry store. Its creator, professor Oyamada's daughter Maki and Lupin say that it was just a show to demonstrate the inhumanity of robots.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd: Voyage to Danger
programme.desc: Someone sent orders to assassinate Lupin. Will he survive or die trying!?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #6 Dragon of Doom
programme.desc: On the bottom of the ocean, within the sunken Titanic, the golden dragon statue waits. When Lupin and the gang are hired to retrieve it, Goemon recognizes the dragon as one of his clan's treasures. Now, he's ready to fight his own friends to protect it!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #7 The Pursuit of Harimao's Treasure
programme.desc: To retrieve the Harimao's Treasure, Lupin and the gang must gather three lost statues. Lupin reluctantly partners with the aging "double-O" MI-6 agent Sir Archer and his granddaughter Diana to gather the statues.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The Red Sox were down three runs and down to their final out against Aroldis Chapman in the 9th inning. After a pair of clutch at-bats helped tie the game, Andrew Benintendi hit a slow chopper in the 10th to walk it off against the Yankees at Fenway Park.

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Denese and her mom return because they know Dejon fathered Denese's daughter! Plus, Rebecca has been on 6 times for 7 DNA tests and returns for her 8th and 9th tests! Will any of these men be her kids' fathers?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The last time Crystal was here, she got a DNA denial, but is back to test another potential father. Then, Aaron and his new girlfriend say there's no way Aaron is the father of Marissa's baby. What truths will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Damon confesses to his girlfriend Shanice that he's been cheating on her with 2 women and has a kid with Danielle who wants him to sign over his parental rights! Monica is scared that her fiancée Cedric is unfaithful. Can he prove her wrong?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jada says that one lover is not enough. She wants to confront her boyfriend to tell him that there's someone else. Next Brandy's husband has moved out to be with his mistress, Rachel. Then Danielle confesses to Rashanda that she is the other woman.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Preston is ready to ditch Jessica for cheating, but he’s the actual cheater! Then, can KB justify falling for Krystal’s god-sister even with a very open relationship?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Shawna and her cousin, Amy, were friends until Amy slept with Shawna's man, Jeremy. Next Danny's girlfriend, Sylvia, has a husband who's gay. David admits he's been a pretty lousy husband, but now he wants to win his wife, DawnMarie, back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Unemployed Sebastian has been badgering his girlfriend Dee to take up any kind of work. Later Steve tells his girlfriend that he's secretly been videotaping and broadcasting them over the Internet!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Today Mark will be forced to choose between his lover, Amy, and his wife. Next Michelle is here to dump her lover for her ex-boyfriend, Frankie. Later, Erikka lives with her boyfriend but her heart belongs to her friend, Larry.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Johnny wants his girlfriend Aimee to accept him for who he is. Then, Maya comes on the show to confront her boyfriend Eric about his tendencies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Joyia está desesperada por evitar que su amiga Stephanie vuelva con su problemático ex Scott. ¡Pero ella todavía lo ama! ¿Tendrá la voluntad de dejarlo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jack está preocupado por sus nietos porque su nuera Carol ha sido negligente y tiene mal genio. Después, Kendra explica por qué de repente dio el bebé de Corey en adopción.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La adolescente Megan vive con su antiguo novio controlador Rick. Megan no puede ir a la escuela, buscar trabajo, ni comer sin su permiso. ¿Pueden su tía y Steve lograr hacerla entender?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Dennis afirma que su ex-novia Kendal lo mantiene amarrado con mentiras sobre su embarazo. ¡Quiere saber si es el padre de su hija! ¿Finalmente los resultados de la prueba de ADN de Steve les permitirán seguir adelante?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Korey está seguro de que su novia Dominique le es infiel y también le preocupa que pueda estar prostituyéndose. Dice que las sospechas han hecho que se vuelva violento. Después, Gregory cree que su novia Robin no le es fiel.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Justin está convencido de que su novia Lainie le ha sido infiel, y lo que es más importante, que no es el padre de su hijo. Pero sus propias inseguridades lo han vuelto violento. Además, Steven duda ser padre del hijo de Ashley.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Rebecca dejó a su bebé con su prometido James y su madre Adeline, y descubrió que su bebé estaba hospitalizado. Rebecca sospecha que James es el responsable. ¡Adeline la culpa de la muerte del bebé!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Pamela quiere pesar 40 libras. Samantha, que sufre de bulimia y alcoholismo, roba para consumir sus atracones. ¿Pueden las dos mujeres lidiar con sus desórdenes alimenticios con apoyo y tratamiento?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Tras sobrevivir a una loca persecución en coche, perder la pierna y estar en coma a causa de su esposo, Portia finalmente lo confrontará. No admitirá la culpa, pero hoy Steve está ayudando a Portia a hacerse oír.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Naomi, de 17 años, ha cambiado repentinamente de actitud y tiene la misión de ser madre. Sus padres, Leeanders y April, necesitan que Steve intervenga.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jennifer se fue de casa para protegerse de su padrastro Allen. 15 años después, su madre quiere una segunda oportunidad, pero Jennifer tiene dudas. ¿Puede Steve ayudar a componer esta familia destruida?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lanikka está harta de los abusos de su novio Malcom. Después, los celos de Tim han destrozado su familia, pero ahora está desesperado por recuperarlos, ¿Tiffany lo dejará definitivamente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desde que Chris tenía 3 meses, su abuela Anne lo crió y le dijo que su madre Hollie era abusiva y que trató de lastimarlo. Ahora Chris y Hollie se van a conocer por primera vez en nuestro escenario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: LaShawna y su novio James sabrán si su amiga Coral lastimó a su hijo hace años. También admitirá que ella le fue infiel con Coral. ¿Cómo reaccionará él cuando descubra otro bombazo?

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Luciano le dice a Gertrudis que él va a internar en un hospital psiquiátrico, porque envenenar a su nieto es una locura. Ella le dice que esté pendiente de su esposa Morgana.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Richard se siente motivado y confiesa su amor a Juliana. Ella se cree traicionada por su mejor amigo y hermano. Natalia y su madre imaginan hacer grandes negocios llevándose el dinero de Mariana.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana cede ante la solicitud de Esteban, quien con sus mentiras logra convencerla e ir juntos al compromiso de Margot y Willy. Margot intenta comprar a Jaime, pero no acepta su oferta, ya que es leal a Willy.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Rosaura conversan sobre la pérdida de su hija. Adriana informa que ve muy mal a Imanol. Luis Mario trata de convencer a Rosaura de que no trabaje con Silvano. Ella no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Maribella así como Silvano y Rosaura se encuentran en el mismo restaurante. Teobaldo le pregunta a su abuela porque le dijo a Luis Mario que la niña se llamaba Angélica.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Guillermo está decepcionado porque Jimena se fue con Rodrigo a ver a Imanol. Luisana lo calma y le dice que tiene que darle tiempo. Luis Mario le cuenta a Eduarda la crisis que sufrió Maribella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva le dice a Luis Mario que Maribella si puede ver y que lo está engañando. Luis Mario no le cree. Imanol vuelve a pedirle disculpas a Adriana. Ella las acepta.

programme.desc: Mercedes le dice a Maximiliano que ella no aprueba el matrimonio entre él y Marcela. Fedora se cuestiona por separar a sus hijas de los hombres que aman. El comisario llega a buscar a Marfil por la desaparición de Fiona.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Marcela le pone a Maximiliano una condición para aceptar ser su esposa, y esta condición tiene que ver con Diana. Kike amenaza a Gaby al ser expulsado de la mansión.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Supernatural powers take center stage in the battle to save Ace as Luffy and his uniquely talented allies throw down with the Navy's own arsenal of Devil Fruit Eaters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A gift from Boa Hancock and Ivan-san's Galaxy Wink get Luffy closer to Ace than ever, but a sword-wielding foe from the past threatens to derail the rescue mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs into a lethal roadblock in the form of Hawk-Eye Mihawk. The legendary swordsman is determined to halt Luffy's onslaught, but Ivan-san, Boa Hancock, and Jimbei aren't ready to give up the fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his pirate brethren have their hands full with an ominous army of unbeatable Kumas! While the inhuman minions march onward, Whitebeard encounters a former ally!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard is betrayed – and brutally stabbed – by one of his own men! In the wake of this unthinkable act of treason, allegations about the legendary pirate bring the battle to a halt!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard shrugs off his injuries and leads a ferocious charge into the heart of the enemy's defenses, but three deadly Admirals join forces to silence his shock wave attack as the pirates find themselves surrounded by impenetrable walls!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the ice melting beneath his feet, Luffy begins a desperate final charge towards his soon-to-be-executed brother. Should his rescue attempt fail, death will surely embrace them both!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile's unexpected assistance creates an opening for Luffy to advance, and Whitebeard has a surprise lurking beneath the ice that might swing the momentum in favor of the pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle rages on and the bodies pile up as Whitebeard squares off against an Admiral, Luffy gets knocked cold, and the legendary Vice-Admiral Garp finally enters the fray!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While awaiting his execution, Ace flashes back to a troubled youth seeking the truth about his father. Meanwhile, Luffy begs Ivan for a potentially-deadly treatment that will allow him to continue fighting!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard struggles to withstand the full force of the Marine onslaught. With the executioner's swords hovering above Ace's head, Straw Hat Luffy discovers a new ability!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard orders his men to help Luffy clear a path to the execution scaffold, but someone close to the Rubber-man rises to derail the rescue mission at the last second!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must defeat the man who taught him how to fight – his own grandfather – in order to save Ace. Battling his own flesh and blood won't be easy, but a waxy ally is there to provide backup!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is finally free from the execution scaffold! Luffy and his brother make a fearsome team as they blaze a path toward salvation. Ravaged by the war, Whitebeard wistfully commands his men to make the journey to the New World without him!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite Whitebeard's order to retreat, Ace is drawn back to the battlefield by the cruel taunts of a Marine adversary. Luffy watches in horror as his brother makes what could be his last stand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An eerie silence falls over the battlefield as Luffy and Ace share a heartbreaking final moment together. With his dying breath, Ace begs his brother to convey a message to his fellow pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Anguished cries echo across the battlefield in the wake of Ace's tragic death. Luffy – paralyzed by grief – must be carried to safety, but Whitebeard summons the strength for one last ferocious attack!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard's children watch in horror as the old man faces off against the villainous Blackbeard pirates. Though his injuries are mounting and the odds are stacked against him, Whitebeard never runs away from a fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The world reacts to Whitebeard's death with shock and awe. Meanwhile, Jimbei risks his life to save Luffy. Blackbeard reveals the depraved depths of his nefarious nature!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Blackbeard and his men seek to sink Marineford, Jimbei and Luffy's desperate attempt to flee is thwarted by Akainu's fiery fists. The situation appears dire until a former enemy lends a sandy hand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Trafalgar Law and the Heart Pirates offer Luffy a submarine escape route. Blackbeard continues his reckless rampage, and a puny pink-haired marine changes the world with a scream!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Heart Pirates head for the bottom of the ocean as Trafalgar Law prepares to operate on Luffy and Jimbei. Meanwhile, the arrival of Shanks brings the bloodshed to a sudden halt!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The world rejoices in the wake of Whitebeard's death, and a host of powerful pirates vie for his position. Meanwhile, Luffy's friends fear that Ace's death may be more than the rubber-man can handle – if he ever wakes up!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Power-hungry pirates terrorize innocent citizens once protected by Whitebeard. Luffy's nightmarish awakening sends him on a reckless rampage that could land him in an early grave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One Piece X Toriko Crossover

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback to the younger days of Luffy and Ace reveals their unusual upbringing under the not-so-watchful eye of villainous mountain bandits!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The flashback continues as Ace robs a ruthless gang of pirates, and Luffy is left to take the fall! Will Ace and his friend Sabo let Luffy be tortured to death - or will they risk their high seas dreams to save him?!

programme.desc: The vision of a hit on crime boss Cathan Donnegal (William McDonald) leads to Johnny's dangerous involvement with the mob.

programme.desc: First, Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them. Later, things get heated for Matt and Sonia just before they head out with Esteban and Lou to ambush a helicopter pilot.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt head to a cul-de-sac to gain possession of a speedboat, and a truck, and a trailer. Later, a rare collectible motorcycle is up for repo, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are ready to collect it. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou nab a.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew. Later, Lou, Sonia, and Froy head out to the boondocks to repo a BMW in the middle of an adult film shoot. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah ride out in Sonia's car.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: It's a brand new start for the Operation Repo team when Lou bets big on a high-risk opportunity and sets up shop in Las Vegas! But first, Ronnie and Froy must wrangle a wrestling ring from a Lucha Libre school.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission, but will it all be derailed when Froy brings unwanted trouble back to the office? Also, Ronnie and Froy run into an unexpected dilemma when a husband's better halves take the reins.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude that gets on Sonia's bad side. When Froy goes missing, Lou has to pick up the slack in a repo that goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Fuming over Froy's departure, Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client and packs his bags to return to LA.? Down two repo men, the pressure is on Ronnie and Carlos, who interrupts a couple in the middle of their less-than-holy matrimony.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas, but there's trouble brewing within the crew's ranks. Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy struggle with language barriers when an Italian photographer and his assistant resort to violence because they can't comprehend. Will Sonia finally reveal what's happening, or will carrying her brother's burden get the best of her?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold-digging RO out on a date, but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou has retired, making Sonia the new boss, but will she be able to keep the company going without her big brother? Matt and Ronnie try to take a car away from a yuppie with an unusual taste for red meat.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia pushes the company to repossess more than just cars, and the backlash from the team threatens to end her time in charge before it's even begun. Ronnie and Matt attempt to repo from a reckless motocross daredevil.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia, the new boss, is still struggling to keep the team in line, but when tragedy strikes on a routine repossession, her reign at the top faces its biggest challenge yet. Matt and Froy hit the club to take a sports car away from a deadbeat DJ.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Carlos goes undercover at a frat house, but when the party gets the best of him Sonia has to step in and fight the drunken mob. Matt and Ronnie go after some wanna-be internet sensations.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo, the team gears up for a mile-high repo of a lifetime! Froy and Sonia repo a water blob from a lake house, but the RO and his friends refuse to let this deflate their party.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo, the team must recover an airplane and return one hundred thousand dollars. But two members of the team bail when it's time to save the company.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia encounter a city employee who tries to give them the boot, and a mechanic's shady scheme comes crashing down on Matt and Ronnie. With Froy still in debt to Sonia, an RO's offer to make a quick buck convinces Froy to break the first rule.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, a mischievous magician gets Ronnie and Carlos to stick together when they interrupt his show to grab his car. Next, Froy and Ronnie have to put their hands on a seriously stupid sugar daddy and the recently upgraded debtor's chest.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold, but have to put the discussion on hold while they repo a hovercraft golf cart from a snooty golfer.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this special one-hour series finale of Operation Repo, the team is scrambling to get ready for the huge Yacht repo to secure the sale of the company and the distribution of their severance packages, while still going after everyday repos.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Attack the Block
programme.desc: ATTACK THE BLOCK is a fast, funny, frightening action adventure movie that pits a teen street gang against an invasion of savage alien monsters. It turns a crazy mix of tough street kids into a team of kick ass heroes.

programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Grossing the highest box-office of any British film in the US when released in 1975, this "cult classic" comedy from the Monty Python team loosely follows the legend of King Arthur, along with his squire and his Knights of the Round Table.

programme.title: Monty Python's Life of Brian
programme.desc: A notorious religious satire, the film tells the story of Brian (Graham Chapman), a reluctant would-be messiah who rises to prominence as a result of a series of absurd and truly hilarious circumstances.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Undoubtedly the funniest film ever made about rock and roll, Rob Reiner's satire about an over-the-hill heavy metal band is a priceless look at the music business and it's madness.

programme.title: Three Amigos!
programme.desc: Steve Martin, Chevy Chase and Martin Short are three wild and crazy caballeros in this comedy adventure that’s a fiesta of fun. Co-starring Phil Hartman and Jon Lovitz, the '¡Three Amigos!' blaze a side-splitting trail across the comedy frontier!

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: Space hero Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) and his half-canine buddy Barf (John Candy) are on a mission in their flying Winnebago to save Princess Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) from the clutches of Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) in Mel Brooks' inspired sci-fi spoof!

programme.title: Tommy Boy

programme.title: Dickie Roberts: Former Child Star

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.desc: The skull-busting war clubs of legendary Chief Crazy Horse take on the blazing rifles of Mexico's revolutionary hero Pancho Villa in this warrior match-up.

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: Forged in Fire

programme.title: Forged in Fire

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Desperate to rescue their fellow agent, Don and his team close in on finding Megan, who is being held hostage by a disturbed teacher (Kim Dickens) on a vicious crime spree.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team must determine if a shooting on the freeway was a random act of violence or the work of a serial killer preying on the citizens of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: As Charlie begins to research the history of the painting, he discovers that it was stolen by the Nazis during the Holocaust, causing Don to refocus his approach to the case.

programme.title: Without A Trace
